title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. polyphylla
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. polyphylla, also known as kidney vetch, is a subspecies of the perennial herbaceous plant Anthyllis vulneraria, native to Europe. The medicinal properties of kidney vetch include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of using kidney vetch include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support urinary tract health. Kidney vetch can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, including skin issues and infections.
